places.name: President Heads
places.description: Giant busts of 42 U.S. presidents sit, crumbling in a field in Virginia.

places.name: Eastern State Hospital
places.description: America's first public mental health facility.

places.name: The Archaearium
places.description: This museum explores the grim reality of life in the earliest British colonies in America.

places.name: The King’s Arms Tavern
places.description: Dine like an American revolutionary at Colonial Williamsburg.

places.name: Presidential Pets Museum
places.description: The "first cat," "first dog," and even a presidential pygmy hippo all get their due in this museum.

places.name: Chowning’s Tavern
places.description: Enjoy dishes that founding fathers once ate at this Colonial Williamsburg pub.

places.name: Lord Botetourt
places.description: Affectionately known as "Lord Bot," this historic statue has a cult social media following and rightly claims to be “the most metal inhabitant of the Wren Yard.”

places.name: Virginia Musical Museum
places.description: Home to the organ played at General MacArthur's funeral.
